message:
feat(engine): add three enrichment integration test suites and extend entropy evidence compressor

New integration test suites (3,837 lines):
- bytecode_vm_integration.rs (1,709 lines): comprehensive bytecode VM
  integration tests covering instruction dispatch, register management,
  control flow, function calls, and execution semantics
- benchmark_behavior_equivalence_integration.rs (1,141 lines):
  benchmark behavior equivalence tests verifying deterministic output
  across execution configurations and workload classes
- parser_event_ast_equivalence_integration.rs (987 lines): parser event
  AST equivalence tests covering constants, enum variants, corpus
  structure, specimen evaluation, and materialization verification

Entropy evidence compressor (entropy_evidence_compressor.rs):
- Minor extension (+4 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
